policy.purpose: Approved and proposed external sources for no-write topic discovery and claim cross-validation.
policy.minimum_public_claim_standard: Any new player-facing mechanic, cost, season, event, or reward claim found externally must be verified against site memory, canonical claims, and at least one additional reliable source or explicit owner confirmation before it can be proposed as public copy.
policy.copyright_policy: External sources are discovery signals only. Do not paraphrase unique wording from competitors; use them to identify player jobs, missing topics, and claims that need independent verification.
policy.crawl_policy: No broad crawling by default. Use explicit URLs, approved search queries, or hosted search tools only when the source entry allows it.
policy.owner_gate: Changing a source from proposed to approved requires owner approval. Public content changes from external evidence still require exact proposed text and owner approval.

sources.name: Last Z: Survival Shooter on Google Play
sources.notes: Official app-store listing. Good for official description, developer identity, app availability, update cadence, and broad feature framing; not enough for detailed mechanics or costs. Live source triage on 2026-05-16 found the current Google Play package at com.readygo.barrel.gp; the older com.global.lastz URL returned 404.

topic_seeds.title: External source opportunity: official app metadata and update-cadence cross-check
topic_seeds.primary_user_job: Keep official app identity, platform availability, and broad game framing aligned with store listings.
evidence: Official store listings can validate app identity, broad feature framing, and update cadence but not detailed mechanics.
topic_seeds.notes: Monitor-only metadata validation. Do not turn store copy into guide copy.

sources.name: Last Z: Survival Shooter on Apple App Store
sources.notes: Official iOS listing. Useful for official metadata, version/update context, app category, and broad game framing; not enough for detailed mechanics or costs.

topic_seeds.title: External source opportunity: official iOS app metadata and update-cadence cross-check
topic_seeds.primary_user_job: Keep official iOS app identity, platform availability, and broad game framing aligned with the App Store listing.
evidence: Official iOS store listing can validate app identity, broad feature framing, and update cadence but not detailed mechanics.
topic_seeds.notes: Monitor-only metadata validation. Do not turn store copy into guide copy.

sources.name: Last Z official Gift Center and store
sources.notes: Official-looking Last Z service domain used for Gift Center and store flow validation. Use only to verify official redeem/store routing, not game mechanics. Live source triage on 2026-05-16 confirmed https://last-z.com/giftCenter/#/login and https://store.last-z.com/#/order respond; https://www.last-z.com did not resolve.

topic_seeds.title: External source opportunity: official Gift Center and store flow validation
topic_seeds.primary_user_job: Confirm that Gift Center setup, UID usage, and official service routing stay accurate.
evidence: Official service domain is the strongest source for Gift Center routing and redeem/store flow validation.
topic_seeds.notes: Use to validate official flow only, not in-game economy or reward claims.

sources.name: StressWar Last Z reference pages
sources.notes: Owner-approved high-trust reference source for research/topic discovery and cross-validation. Do not copy wording; exact mechanics still need corroboration before public copy.

topic_seeds.title: External source opportunity: research cost and branch coverage cross-check
topic_seeds.primary_user_job: Catch missing research branches, cost-table drift, and branch naming conflicts before players rely on outdated planning.
evidence: Owner-approved research reference source can reveal branch coverage gaps and cost/name drift.
topic_seeds.notes: Do not hand-edit generated research pages; validate against JSON sources and generator output.

sources.name: Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki on Fandom
sources.notes: Blocked on 2026-05-16 to avoid duplicate Fandom source signals. Use the owner-approved lastz.fandom.com source entry instead; public claims still need stronger validation.
discovery_queries: site:last-z-survival-shooter.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events

topic_seeds.title: External source opportunity: hero roster and entity coverage cross-check
topic_seeds.primary_user_job: Identify missing hero entities, naming conflicts, and outdated hero coverage without changing rankings automatically.
evidence: Community wiki can surface hero/entity names that need comparison against entities.json and current hero pages.
topic_seeds.notes: Ranking changes remain high-risk and require owner-approved visible text.

sources.name: LastZWiki.com reference pages
sources.notes: Owner-approved high-trust reference/wiki-style site. Useful for topic and entity discovery; every mechanic/cost claim still needs independent verification before public copy.
discovery_queries: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research

topic_seeds.title: External source opportunity: HQ and progression requirement cross-check
topic_seeds.primary_user_job: Verify HQ requirement planning, construction dependencies, and progression-route coverage against reference data.
evidence: Owner-approved wiki/reference source can reveal HQ and progression planning gaps.
topic_seeds.notes: Do not publish exact requirements from one source without corroboration.

sources.name: last-z.wiki reference pages
sources.notes: Unofficial wiki/reference site with apparent data-oriented pages. Use as a discovery and second-source candidate only; verify exact mechanics before public copy.
discovery_queries: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost

topic_seeds.title: External source opportunity: event and season coverage cross-check
topic_seeds.primary_user_job: Compare event naming, rotation coverage, and season references against approved external references.
evidence: Reference pages may surface event or season naming differences that need validation against canonical site memory.
topic_seeds.notes: Season naming conflicts must preserve the site's canonical newer-server interpretation unless owner approves a change.

sources.name: Last Z Command Center
sources.notes: Owner-approved high-trust community tool/source. Use for topic discovery and cross-validation signals; do not treat tool output as public-copy approval.

topic_seeds.title: External source opportunity: calculator and planning-tool gap review
topic_seeds.primary_user_job: Decide whether players would benefit from a calculator/tool page or whether current guide pages already solve the job.
evidence: Owner-approved community tool may reveal calculator-style jobs not covered by static guides.
topic_seeds.notes: Monitor-only until owner decides whether tool pages fit the site strategy.

sources.name: Last Z Wiki on Fandom
sources.notes: Owner-approved high-trust Fandom wiki source. Use for topic/entity discovery and cross-validation; verify mechanics before public copy. Live source triage on 2026-05-16 found direct fetch can return 403, so use the search provider for this source instead of treating fetch failures as source failure.
discovery_queries: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events

topic_seeds.title: External source opportunity: Fandom entity and event cross-check
topic_seeds.primary_user_job: Cross-check hero, event, and entity naming against current site memory before future content expansion.
evidence: Owner-approved Fandom source can surface alternate naming or missing entities for review.
topic_seeds.notes: Use entities.json as the local canonical registry before proposing visible copy.

sources.name: Packsify Last Z gear guide
sources.notes: Owner-approved medium-trust gear-guide source. Use for equipment-topic discovery and cross-validation only; do not copy article wording.

topic_seeds.title: External source opportunity: gear guide coverage cross-check
topic_seeds.primary_user_job: Find equipment-guide coverage gaps around gear use, upgrade order, and terminology.
evidence: Owner-approved gear guide can reveal equipment topics or terminology to cross-check.
topic_seeds.notes: Do not copy article wording; only use as topic discovery and validation context.

sources.name: MMediaMreza Last Z reference pages
sources.notes: Owner-approved medium-trust guide/reference source, but use exact Last Z pages rather than the generic homepage. Live source triage on 2026-05-16 found the root metadata too generic for evidence; keep this source limited to Last Z-specific URLs surfaced by search.

topic_seeds.title: External source opportunity: general guide gap cross-check
topic_seeds.primary_user_job: Identify broad guide-topic gaps from an approved external guide/reference source without creating duplicate intent pages.
evidence: Owner-approved medium-trust source can be used to discover guide topics that need mapping to existing clusters.
topic_seeds.notes: Monitor-only until a specific player job and target page are identified.

sources.name: LastZSurvivalShooter.com player guides
sources.notes: Unofficial player-guide site. Useful for seeing what players write guides about, but not trusted enough for mechanic claims without stronger verification.

sources.name: GameStratWiki Last Z guides
sources.notes: General guide site. Useful for topic discovery and SERP landscape only; claims need stronger cross-validation.
discovery_queries: site:gamestratwiki.com Last Z Survival Shooter guide

sources.name: Earnne Last Z codes tracker
sources.notes: Codes tracker. Potentially useful for discovering code-related search competition, but redemption-flow claims may conflict with this site's canonical Gift Center guidance.

sources.name: lastzshooter.com blocked source
sources.notes: Blocked because search snippets show likely off-topic or fabricated Last Z content patterns. Do not use as source evidence unless manually re-reviewed.
